content:
Set up GitHub backup for the Heavyar project.

Repository:
https://github.com/deadevil2002/heavyar-app.git

Goal:
Push the current Heavyar project to this GitHub repository as a clean baseline backup after Phase 3.5.1 UI/UX fixes.

Important constraints:
- Do NOT change app logic
- Do NOT refactor anything
- Do NOT modify working flows
- This task is strictly for version control and backup

Tasks:

1. Initialize Git if not already initialized
2. Add a proper .gitignore for Expo / React Native / Firebase environment
3. Ensure the following are NOT committed:
   - node_modules
   - .env files or secrets
   - API keys or sensitive config
   - local system files
   - build/cache folders
4. Connect the project to:
   https://github.com/deadevil2002/heavyar-app.git
5. Commit the current project state with message:
   "Baseline: Phase 3.5.1 UI fixes + marketplace working + cloudinary integration"
6. Push to the main branch
7. If the repository is empty, set it up cleanly
8. If any issue occurs, explain clearly instead of making risky changes

Return:
1. Push status
2. Branch name
3. Commit hash
4. Any files excluded for safety
